nasb.text: They have also shut the doors of the porch and put out the lamps, and have not burned incense or offered burnt offerings in the holy place to the God of Israel.

esv.text: They also shut the doors of the vestibule and put out the lamps and have not burned incense or offered burnt offerings in the Holy Place to the God of Israel.

cnv.text: 他們又封閉廊門，熄滅燈火，不在聖所中向以色列的　神燒香或獻燔祭。

ccb.text: 他们封锁殿廊的门，吹灭灯火，不在圣所里向以色列的上帝烧香、献燔祭。
